case_title: RODRIGUEZ, MARTA LILIAN M. VS MONTOYA, BLANCA LIDIA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,200.00 FILED BY RODRIGUEZ, MARTA LILIAN M. AS TO DEFENDANT MONTOYA, BLANCA LIDIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-28-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MONTOYA, BLANCA LIDIA
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-28-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-06-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUANCE IS FOR DEFENDANT TO BRING TRANSLATOR.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RODRIGUEZ, MARTA LILIAN M. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MONTOYA, BLANCA LIDIA $2,200.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,200.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RODRIGUEZ, MARTA LILIAN M. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MONTOYA, BLANCA LIDIA $2,200.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,200.00, PAYMENTS TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $500 PER QUARTER (EVERY 3 MONTHS) BEGINNING 3/7/02; AND ON THE 7TH DAY OF EACH QUARTER THEREAFTER UNTIL PAID IN FULL. IF ANY PAYMENT IS MISSED THE ENTIRE BALACE BECOMES DUE IMMEDIATELY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
